title: mangifera merrillii
intro: Mangifera merrillii, also known as the Philippine mango, is a species of mango tree that is native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Mangifera merrillii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, or used in herbal preparations such as ointments, tinctures, and capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
